attestation_text: PILOT, NOT BLINDED. This submission is authored by the AutoMechInterp maintainers for the sole purpose of exercising the Custodian evaluation pipeline end-to-end (schema validation, tarball SHA-256, contract-pin audit, evaluator re-run, and results aggregation). It does NOT satisfy the independence requirements of methodology/blinded_holdout_protocol.md and MUST NOT be counted as external evidence. The payload is a maintainer-authored bundle re-sealed into the holdout pipeline; re-evaluation under the pinned evaluator is expected to reproduce the released accepted/rejected tier assignments for IOI v0 on gpt2-small.
